name: 3D Model Viewer
description: Upload OBJ, STL, or GLB files and share interactive 3D models in chat. Powered by Three.js.
author: Eluthio

changelog.1.0.7: Fix upload error handling; add Accept header to XHR
changelog.1.0.6: Post-upload confirmation panel; allow-download toggle; configurable max upload size
changelog.1.0.4: Fixed CSS bundling and missing styles
